title: SUPPORTED EMPLOYMENT - 211info
text: RESTORED CONNECTIONS PEER CENTER SUPPORTED EMPLOYMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance in overcoming barriers to stable employment. Services available to clients may include basic resume assistance, connections with second chance employers, and assistance in preparing for interviews such as mock scenarios and role playing. Transportation to interviews and attire is provided to all participants in the program. 146 E 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Individuals in recovery Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (458) 544-0000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (458) 544-0000 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Job Finding Assistance * Substance Use Disorder Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - ACCESS TO MEDICAL HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING SUPPORT MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - RECOVERY BASED PEER MENTORS SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - RECOVERY COMMUNITY CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. RESTORED CONNECTIONS PEER CENTER
